Safety & Security Compliance Testing

items.notes: Parasoft sells software testing tools (static analysis, unit testing, code coverage, API testing) used to verify safety-critical embedded software including avionics/UAV software per DO-178C. test_and_measurement is the closest category, though the definition skews physical.

products_categories.notes: No UXV-hardware or drone-specific software categories apply. Parasoft's tools are broad software testing tools; test_and_measurement is the closest fit.

value.address: 101 E. Huntington Drive, Second Floor, Monrovia, CA 91016

evidence.snippet:
**Parasoft Corporation HQ**
[101 E. Huntington Drive, Second Floor
Monrovia, CA 91016 USA](https://goo.gl/maps/yiiDqsST571L5R468)

The innovation you need. The experience you trust. From development to QA, Parasoft’s comprehensive software testing solutions reduce the time, effort, and cost of delivering secure, reliable, and compliant software. Leverage our AI-infused automated testing solutions to drive continuous quality practices throughout your CI/CD pipeline.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Parasoft is a general-purpose software testing company serving automotive, medical, finance, telecom, rail, and military/aerospace sectors. Unmanned aerial vehicles are cited only as one example of military/aerospace customers. No UXV-specific product line exists.

### Expertise & Innovation
Built on a foundation of innovation with more than 38 patents, Parasoft has been leading the industry in automated software testing and continuous quality solutions for 35+ years.

readiness.notes: Parasoft sells commercial software products with established customer base (35+ years) and named SKUs available for trial/demo/purchase.

unresolved_questions: Parasoft's involvement in UXV supply chain is marginal — they sell software testing tools used by aerospace/defense companies that build UAVs, but this is incidental to their broad multi-industry positioning.
tagline: Software testing and quality platform spanning static analysis, unit testing, code coverage, API testing, runtime debugging, and test data management for C/C++, Java, .NET, and web applications. Tools address embedded safety-critical and enterprise compliance needs (DO-178C, ISO 26262, IEC 62304, MISRA). NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence on defense-sector adoption is limited.
